clips.title: The Catch-Up
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm grade. A cozy sunlit cafe, coffee cups on a small table, soft bokeh of the room behind. A two-shot framing two people together seated across the little table, mid-conversation, one gesturing as the other listens and smiles. People in casual smart-casual clothes. Warm window light, soft bokeh, 40mm, two-shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Talk
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, golden grade. A park bench at sunset, trees and warm sky behind. A two-shot framing two people together sitting on the bench, turned slightly toward each other in quiet conversation. People in light autumn coats. Warm golden light, soft glow, 40mm, two-shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Dinner
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm kitchen grade. A cozy home kitchen in the evening, warm pendant light, ingredients on the counter. A two-shot framing two people together at the counter cooking side by side, one chopping as the other stirs a pot, easy rapport. People in casual home clothes and aprons. Warm kitchen light, soft steam, 40mm, two-shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Toast
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody grade. A stylish bar in the evening, warm glowing bottles behind. A two-shot framing two people together at the bar raising glasses in a toast, clinking, smiling. People in smart evening attire. Warm bar light, bottle bokeh, 40mm, two-shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Walk
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, serene grade. A wide beach at low tide, soft surf and pale sky behind. A two-shot framing two people together walking side by side barefoot along the waterline, talking. People in rolled-up light clothes. Soft warm light, sea haze, 40mm, two-shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Standoff
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A rain-slicked alley at night, a single overhead light, wet brick. A two-shot framing two people together facing each other a few feet apart, tension between them, still and squared off. People in dark rugged jackets. Cool wet light, deep shadow, 40mm, two-shot. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
